Perfect! Both changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of what was completed:
## Summary
I've successfully updated both files to change `--for-plan` to `--for-pr`:
### File 1: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/commands/types.py` - **Line 64**: Updated docstring example from `"erk br co --for-plan 123"` to `"erk br co --for-pr 123"`
### File 2: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/core.py` - **Line 432**: Updated hardcoded string in the formatted markdown output from `erk br co --for-plan {pr_number}` to `erk br co --for-pr {pr_number}`
Both edits have been verified and the files now reference the correct `--for-pr` flag instead of the deprecated `--for-plan` flag.
